text:

  - Restore GTK2 option.
  - Enable IMAGEMAGICK option by default.
  - Add GNUTLS option.
  - Fix the issue with bad plist generation and mention it in UPDATING.
  - Include 'alloca' fix provided by swell.k@gmail.com [1].
